title: After travelling overseas with mobile devices

group-parts.group: After travelling overseas with mobile devices
group-parts.name: overview
group-parts.prose: Following overseas travel with mobile devices, personnel should take appropriate precautions to ensure that they do not pose an undue security risk to their organisation’s systems. In most cases, sanitising and resetting mobile devices, including all removable media, will be sufficient. However, upon returning from high or extreme risk countries, additional precautions will likely be needed.
